name: claude-statusline-widgets
description: Claude Code statusline with cache TTL countdown and interactive TUI configurator

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "(async()=>{const {existsSync,writeFileSync,mkdirSync,chmodSync}=require('fs');const {spawnSync}=require('child_process');const {join}=require('path');const {homedir}=require('os');const isGlobal=process.env.npm_config_global==='true'||process.env.npm_config_location==='global';if(!isGlobal)return;const prefix=process.env.npm_config_prefix;if(!prefix)return;const script=join(process.cwd(),'scripts','postinstall.js');if(process.platform==='win32'){const localAppData=process.env.LOCALAPPDATA||join(homedir(),'AppData','Local');const launcher=join(localAppData,'claude-statusline-widgets','global-runtime','package','bin','ccfooter-config.js');if(existsSync(script)){const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,[script],{stdio:'inherit'});if((result.status??0)!==0)process.exit(result.status??1);}if(!existsSync(launcher))return;writeFileSync(join(prefix,'ccfooter-config.cmd'),['@ECHO OFF','SETLOCAL','IF EXIST "%~dp0\node.exe" (',`  "%~dp0\node.exe" "${launcher}" %*`,') ELSE (',`  node "${launcher}" %*`,')',''].join('
'));writeFileSync(join(prefix,'ccfooter-config.ps1'),['$basedir = Split-Path $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Definition -Parent','if (Test-Path "$basedir\node.exe") {',`  & "$basedir\node.exe" "${launcher}" $args`,'} else {',`  & "node" "${launcher}" $args`,'}',''].join('
'));return;}const launcher=join(process.cwd(),'bin','ccfooter-config.js');if(!existsSync(launcher))return;const binDir=join(prefix,'bin');mkdirSync(binDir,{recursive:true});const shim=join(binDir,'ccfooter-config');writeFileSync(shim,['#!/usr/bin/env sh',`exec node "${launcher}" "$@"`,''].join('
'));chmodSync(shim,0o755);})().catch(err=>{console.error(err);process.exit(1);})"
